case_title: EVA SO PO CHOI VS. ERIC ROSS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOI, EVA SO PO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSS, ERIC $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,110.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED OCT-03-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, ERIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---JOSEPHINE ZHAO. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY CHOI, EVA SO PO AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY CHOI, EVA SO PO
